overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through a neon-lit fast food stall called 'PieZ'. The player moves from the entrance corridor past a seated customer, approaches the service counter with a vendor, and enters the back kitchen area to examine food preparation surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk fast food stall entrance corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow entrance corridor of the food stall, passing illuminated advertisements

notable_agents.action: seated customer wearing red cap waiting on a bench against the wall

entered.detail: large pink neon sign with stylized 'PieZ' lettering mounted on the wall
illuminated poster displaying a sports car with red Japanese text
large backlit advertisement poster with 'All night. Every night.' text
green and black automated vending machine with glowing interface
red neon 'OPEN' sign above the service window
metal bench where a customer is seated

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow cyberpunk food stall corridor illuminated by pink neon signs and advertisements. A customer sits on a bench to the right, and various glowing posters line the walls including a large car advertisement and 'Mr. Stud' ad.

events.description: moving from the entrance corridor into the main service counter area

agents.ego_description: approaching the service counter where a vendor stands behind the protective glass

notable_agents.action: vendor in blue uniform standing behind the counter looking toward the player

entered.detail: long metal counter with protective glass separating customer and service areas
illuminated digital menu showing food options and prices

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the service counter of the PieZ food stall. A vendor in a blue uniform stands behind the counter, and digital menu displays glow on the right wall. The seated customer and entrance advertisements fall behind as the player moves deeper into the establishment.

events.description: passing the vendor and entering the back kitchen area with yellow industrial lighting

agents.ego_description: moving through the kitchen and examining food items on the preparation counters

entered.detail: stainless steel counter with stacks of plates and food preparation items
industrial microwave with red digital display showing 'OPEN'
plate with two sandwiches and a pile of french fries
industrial stainless steel sink with faucet and cleaning supplies
white cardboard box on the floor containing supplies

segments.scene_description: The player enters the back kitchen area illuminated by warm yellow industrial lighting. The space contains stainless steel preparation counters, a microwave oven, and plates of prepared food including sandwiches and fries. The area is empty of people, with only kitchen equipment and supplies visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit public corridor into the industrial interior of a fast food kitchen. It begins by navigating a narrow passage illuminated by pink neon signs and glowing advertisements, passing a seated customer on a bench. As the camera moves deeper into the establishment, the entrance advertisements fall away and the view opens up to a service counter where a vendor in a blue uniform stands beneath digital menu displays. The scene then shifts from the vibrant storefront into the back kitchen area, where the lighting transitions from neon pinks to warm yellow industrial tones. Finally, the camera glides past stainless steel preparation counters and kitchen equipment, settling on plates of sandwiches and fries in the empty workspace.
